title: Assessment of rural livelihoods in two lakeside communities in Mityana and Mukono districts, Uganda Evidence for Development Working paper 7
author: Petty, C
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This Working Paper reports on two village level livelihoods studies, conducted as part of the HyCRISTAL rural livelihoods pilot . Detailed quantitative information was collected from households residing in  lakeshore communities in Uganda, one on Lake Wamala in Mityana district and one on Lake Victoria in Mukono district, using the Individual Household Method (IHM).
steps_raw: This Working Paper reports on two village level livelihoods studies, conducted as part of the HyCRISTAL rural livelihoods pilot . Detailed quantitative information was collected from households residing in  lakeshore communities in Uganda, one on Lake Wamala in Mityana district and one on Lake Victoria in Mukono district, using the Individual Household Method (IHM).
